Put BIMCamel.dll in this folder (Contents\), next to the en-US\ and Resources\ folders.

It is the Release build of the plug-in:  BIMCamel\bin\Release\net48\BIMCamel.dll

Once the DLL is here, copy the whole BIMCamel.bundle folder into:
    %AppData%\Autodesk\ApplicationPlugins\

You can delete this text file.
